allow: PowerShell($output = "C:\\Users\\eduar\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-eduar-OneDrive-Documentos-Claude-codes-pagocre\\7fdfd87e-fbf5-41d3-ab03-1080af234168\\tasks\\bpyxbgnhu.output"; $start = Get-Date; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $content = Get-Content $output -Tail 3 -Raw; Write-Output $content; if \($content -match "Success|Error|error|failed"\) { break } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $start.AddMinutes\(3\)\))
